Quest: Grangpa Figure_Seven

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, hello? How are you doing?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Jane! I am so glad to see you.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I have to say, I am a bit surprised. I never thought you would actually come.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I promised I would come, didn’t I?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
That’s true.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But I thought you were not very fond of people like me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, by people like you, you mean...umm...

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Yeah, I mean prostitute. And don't worry, you can say that word. I don't mind.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You don’t find it demeaning?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Why would I? I am a prostitute, after all.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, but still...

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I understand why you think like that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
We live in a society where being a sex worker is not socially acceptable.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Same goes for any other sex-related work like pornstar.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And yet, people have no problem watching porn or going to the brothel.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Don’t you think it’s kinda hypocritical?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I guess you are right.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Exactly. Everything depends on your own perspective.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
If you are okay with being a whore or a pornstar, it doesn't matter what the world thinks of it.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
After all, the world won't come to your rescue.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You have to take care of yourself.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You should know it better than anyone else.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What are you talking about?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I know that you used to work for a big corporation until you got fired.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
How did you...?!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Why are you so surprised?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Or did you forget that another ex-employee of the same company is now working for me.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] She must be talking about Sarah.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] She probably told her about me.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Oh yeah. Now it makes sense.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So yeah, what I am trying to say is, forget about society and do whatever you want to do with your life.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It’s easy for you to say.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But I have a family.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Can you imagine how they would react if they found out their own daughter became a prostitute.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I am sure it will be very unpleasant for them. But if they love you, they will accept you no matter what you do.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am not so sure about it.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Ha ha. Looks like our conversation took a serious turn.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah. Let's slow down.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Right. But I noticed something about you just now.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Not once in our entire conversation did you say that you don't like being a prostitute.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I umm... don't think there is anything wrong with it.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So, do you wanna become one?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What! No, no way!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Because society and your parents won't be okay with it?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, right.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So, hypothetically speaking, if they were okay with it, you would have no problem becoming a prostitute?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Huh, no! That's not what I mean!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I think this is exactly what you mean.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Do you remember the first time we met?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I do.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I offered you to work for me.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You turned me down immediately.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But you didn't get offended or tell me that my profession is gross or filthy.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, that's because I didn't want to be rude.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
True. But I also think deep down you are very adventurous.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Only thing holding you back is the unnecessary social obligations.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But I am sure one day you will see your true potential.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am not so sure about that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Don’t dismiss it so easily.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
For example, if you have no intention whatsoever to become a prostitute, then why did you come to see me, a madame?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Because you asked me too.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Which you could easily ignore.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I guess that's because I liked you as a person.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And also I wanted some advice about something.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Really! You want my advice?!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Sure. I would be happy to do so.
\>After that Jane told her about the situation between
\>her and the oldman.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Hmm, I see. So this man, whom you are looking after, you want to get him a girlfriend?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, something like that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Hang on, is this the same guy for whom you wanted to hire a prostitute?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah right.
(\c[23]She said very timidly.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Really?! You must be very close to him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I feel sorry for him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
He lives alone in a crappy shack. And his family abandoned him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So I check on him from time to time.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Hmm, I don’t know. I think it's more than that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Girl like you won't just hire a prostitute for anyone.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
The fact that you did that for him makes me think you are into him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What! No! You are way wrong!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
He is the same age as my grandfather. There is nothing attractive about him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Not to mention he stays naked all the time.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You don’t need to find someone attractive to...

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But hang on! Did you say he stays naked all the time?!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, yeah.
(\c[23]She replied shamefully.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
At first it was kinda distracting. But I got used to it now.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Hmm, I see. Now it all makes sense.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What makes sense?! I told you I am not into him or something!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh you poor thing! I am sure you are very confused right now.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Of course I am confused. Because you are not making any sense.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well then, let me explain it to you.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Do you know what fetishes or kinks?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, guess so. Some sexual fantasies, right?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Yeah. something like that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Some people are into roleplay, some like BDSM, and some fantasize to fuck in public.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And then there are some extreme fetishes. Like getting turned on by humiliation, exhibitionism, and so on.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And in your case, my dear, I think you are into older people.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What! Haven't you heard a single word I said so far?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I don’t even find him attractive. There is no way...

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But that is what makes it a fetish.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
If you did find him attractive, then it wouldn't be a fetish.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I mean think about it for a moment.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You said he is always naked, right?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And yet keep visiting him regularly.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yes but that’s because...

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And don't give the bullshit excuse like you feel sorry for him or something like that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I think deep down you also know this is not why you keep going to him.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Is she right about it?!\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] But how? How can it be possible?\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Do I really think about him that way?\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] No, it can’t be. Even thinking about it makes me repulsed in disgust.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] No way I can get intimate with an older man like him!\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am sorry but I think you are wrong.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Not only do I not find him attractive, but even the thought of me having sex with him also makes me vomit.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well, that's why it's called a fetish. Quite an extreme one at that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Let me explain something to you. And then you can tell me whether or not I am right.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
That old man has no problem walking around naked in front of a girl. Which means he is a total pervert.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I guess you can say that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Of course I can. I also think he already made his move on you. Am I right?
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Yeah, he did. Multiple times.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Something that qualifies as sextual harassment?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I guess so.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So a total perv, who stays naked all the time, made a move on you and also sexually harassed You, and yet you keep visiting him.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Why is that?
(\c[23]Jane was lost for words. She didn't know how to respond to this.\c[0])
(\c[23]But she was trying hard to come up with an answer.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I...I didn't think of it like that before. Why do I keep visiting him?!\c[0])
(\c[23]But despite trying her best, she couldn't come up with a reasonable answer.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh dear! Looks like you are in shock.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And I haven’t even finished yet.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] There are more!\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Despite all of that, not only do you keep seeing him, you fulfill his outrageous wishes like hiring a whore or finding a girlfriend.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Tell me why you would do all those things for such a detestable man like him?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I...I don't know. I don't know anymore.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Come on now, there is no need to get sad.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You have done nothing wrong.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You just act upon your own desire.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Tell me, every time you went to see him, did it make you feel excited, or every time he demanded something unreasonable from you, did it make your heart pound?
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] It's like she is reading me like an open book! Everything she is saying is true! I can't deny it anymore.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Even though you find him repulsive, disgusting, and unattractive, you still can't stop seeing him. Am I wrong?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
(Sigh) No, you are not wrong.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Don't say it like it's a bad thing.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
How is it not a bad thing?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
It's not harming you in any way, is it?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No, but still...

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Then there are no buts.
(\c[23]She interrupted her.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You need to accept the fact that this is one of your hidden desires.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
The sooner you can do that is better.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Otherwise it will create an internal conflict within yourself.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And how do I do that?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
As I said before, accept yourself.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
By accepting myself do you mean I should...I should act upon those fantasies?!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Yep. Now you are getting it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But how is it...how is it possible?!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I mean everyone has some types of fantasies.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But trying to make it real is completely different.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Correct me if I am wrong, but I think you have started doing it already.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I mean, any other girl would have run away after seeing a naked old man, but you didn't.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Instead you became close to him.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I can’t argue with her anymore. She has an answer for every question.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You know, for a prostitute, you are very smart.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Thanks for your compliment.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And what makes you think a whore can't be smart?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I thought, only those, who are unqualified to do anything else, become a prostitute.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Yeah, it’s true in most cases.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But some became sex worker because they like it.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Take me for example. I have a college degree and could have easily gotten any other job.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But instead I choose this.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Why did you?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Because I like it silly. Oh, and also because it pays more than many other minimum-level jobs.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am not gonna lie; talking to you was really eye opening for me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I learned a lot.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I am glad to hear it.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I hope it will change your point of view about my profession.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah I guess so.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Then may I offer you to join my brothel once more?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Ha ha. You don't waste any time, do you?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You know what? I will keep it in mind.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Maybe one day I will be brave enough to do it.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I hope this day never comes.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
That’s what I like to hear.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I will wait for this day then.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, it was really fun discussing it with you. But it still hasn't solved my problem.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Which problem was it?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You know, about finding a partner for the old man.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh, that one.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So, can you help me with it?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Sure I can. But I don't think you need my help.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What do you mean?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Why don’t you keep him company?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Me?!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Of course. Didn't we already agree that you have a thing for older men?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But, if you think you are not ready for it, then I will do it for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You mean you will become his girlfriend?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well, I can pay him a visit from time to time.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You would do that for me?!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Yeah. But not just because you asked me to.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You see, I also have a thing for older men.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And unlike you, I am not afraid to act upon my desire.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But I hope it won’t come to this.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Because I haven't lost my faith in you yet.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I still believe you will do the right thing.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I think I know what she means by "right thing" .\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, thank you very much for your help.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I guess I will go and talk to him about him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
After that, I will come back to let you know my decision.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Sure. I will be waiting for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well then, see you later.

Well then, what have you decided?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I umm...I will take care of him myself.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Really! I knew you would make the right decision.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I don’t know if it’s right. But I decided to go with it anyway.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Is that so? Not a bad idea.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Maybe both of us can have some fun together with him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I-I don’t know if I am ready for that yet.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
No worries. I won’t pressure you into anything.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well then, what have you decided?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I-I don’t think I can do it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am not as brave as you thought I was.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh. That’s a bummer.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I surely thought you would make the right decision.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I guess it's just not in me.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I am not losing hope yet. I am sure you will come around.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But until then, I guess I could keep that old man company.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I can’t thank you enough for doing it for me.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well, like I said before, I am into older men too.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So I am partially doing it for myself.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Whatever the reason might be, I am still grateful.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But anyway, that’s why I came, to let you know my decision.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So I guess I should get going now.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
See you. And feel free to visit me anytime you want.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And by anytime I mean before evening.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Otherwise I won’t be at home.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But of course, if you want to see me badly, you can always talk to me in the Brothel.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Sure. I will keep it in mind.
Quest: Girl's Day Out

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Jane! Finally! I was waiting for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I hope I’m not too late?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You are just in time.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I forgot to mention it before, I really like your new dress.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
It’s much more...how do I put it’s more...

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No need to hesitate, just go ahead and say it. It’s more slutty.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Ha ha ha. You took the word right off my mouth.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So anyway, tell me, how can I entertain you tonight?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I'm just here to spend some time with you, that’s all.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
No, no, no.That won’t do.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
That’s our first date. We have to make it special.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, I-I didn’t know you would take it that seriously.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If I knew, I would have brought something for you.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Don’t you worry about it. You are here, that’s all I care about.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Now then, in case you forgot, you promised me a story.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, right. But it is not much of a story, more like a nightmare.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh dear! I didn’t know it’s that painful for you. Let’s not talk about it then.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No, I want to. Sharing it with someone else will lighten my load.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
That’s a fair point. Let’s hear it then.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But hold on, before you start, let me bring something to drink.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
It will make it easier.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, you are right.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
There you go. Alcohol is the best medicine to lighten up the mood.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So it all started when...
